description:
Fast, open-weight image generation model (32B parameters), derived from the FLUX.2 base model. Send up to 3 images (jpeg/ png/ webp) to use for image editing or as references.

Optional parameters:
Set aspect ratio: 16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16
